heading: Definitions
label: 410kkk Definitions
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in introductory provisions, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , , which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Short Title note below and Tables.Pub. L. 108–387118 Stat. 2234Oct. 30, 2004

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 108–387, title I, § 101118 Stat. 2234Oct. 30, 2004“This title [enacting this subchapter and repealing sections 450mm to 450mm–3 of this title] may be cited as the ‘Lewis and Clark National Historical Park Designation Act’.”

children.heading: Park
children.label: 1 Park
children.text: The term “park” means the Lewis and Clark National Historical Park designated in .section 410kkk–1 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 2 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
